channel.title: Delinea, Inc. — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Delinea, Inc. (delinea).

item.title: CVE-2026-2409 · 9.3 CRITICAL
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection') vulnerability in Delinea Cloud Suite allows Argument Injection.This issue affects Cloud Suite: before 25.2 HF1.

item.title: CVE-2025-12812 · 5.3 MEDIUM — Cloud Suite and Privilege Access Service – SQL Injection
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection') in Delinea Inc. Cloud Suite and Privileged Access Service. Remediation: This issue is fixed in Cloud Suite: 25.1

item.title: CVE-2025-12811 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Cloud Suite and Privilege Access Service– HTTP request smuggling vulnerability
item.description: Improper Inconsistent Interpretation of HTTP Requests ('HTTP Request Smuggling') in Delinea Inc. Cloud Suite and Privileged Access Service. If you're not using the latest Server Suite agents, this fix requires that you upgrade to Server Suite 2023.1…

item.title: CVE-2025-12810 · 5.3 MEDIUM — Failure in Password Rotation and Check-in Mechanism in Secret Server Allows Reuse of Credentials
item.description: Improper Authentication vulnerability in Delinea Inc. Secret Server On-Prem (RPC Password Rotation modules).This issue affects Secret Server On-Prem: 11.8.1, 11.9.6, 11.9.25. A secret with "change password on check in" enabled automatically checks in…

item.title: CVE-2025-6942 · 3.8 LOW
item.description: The distributed engine versions 8.4.39.0 and earlier of Secret Server versions 11.7.49 and earlier can be exploited during an initial authorization event that would allow an attacker to impersonate another distributed engine.

item.title: CVE-2025-6943 · 3.8 LOW
item.description: Secret Server version 11.7 and earlier is vulnerable to a SQL report creation vulnerability that allows an administrator to gain access to restricted tables.

item.title: CVE-2024-12908 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Delinea addressed a reported case on Secret Server v11.7.31 (protocol handler version 6.0.3.26) where, within the protocol handler function, URI's were compared before normalization and canonicalization, potentially leading to over matching against t…
